data_type: perturb-seq
description: Genome-wide Perturb-seq: ~11000 single-gene CRISPR knockdowns in K562 cells. Pseudo-bulk h5ad with expression changes across ~8000 genes per knockdown.
download_instructions: Download the h5ad file (~2.7 GB). Run setup.py to process into parquet format.

data_type: snRNA-seq
description: Single-nucleus RNA-seq of prefrontal cortex and anterior cingulate cortex from 41 post-mortem samples (15 ASD + 16 control + 10 epilepsy). Cell-type-specific DE across 17 cell types.
cell_types: 17 cell types including excitatory/inhibitory neurons and glia
download_instructions: 1. Go to GEO page. 2. Download supplementary files (processed counts). 3. OR download Table S5 from the Science paper (cell-type-specific DE results): https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.aav8130

data_type: bulk RNA-seq
description: Bulk RNA-seq of 725 brain samples across 11 cortical areas from 112 post-mortem brains (49 ASD + 63 control). 4200 DE genes. Largest cortex-wide ASD transcriptome study.
download_instructions: 1. Create free Synapse account at synapse.org. 2. Request access to PsychENCODE data. 3. Download processed DE tables from syn21349974.

data_type: bulk RNA-seq
description: Transcriptome-wide isoform-level analysis of 1695 post-mortem brain samples across ASD + SCZ + BD. Cross-disorder DE and splicing results.
download_instructions: 1. Create free Synapse account. 2. Request PsychENCODE access. 3. Download DER-13 (DE genes) and DER-14 (DE transcripts).

data_type: snRNA-seq
description: PsychENCODE Phase II: snRNA-seq of 388 post-mortem brains (ASD + SCZ + BD + control). 28 cell types. Largest single-cell psychiatric dataset.
download_instructions: 1. Create Synapse account. 2. Apply for data access through PsychENCODE portal. 3. Download processed count matrices and DE tables.

data_type: snRNA-seq
description: Single-cell atlas of human brain development from 45 days to 40 years. Includes ASD-relevant developmental trajectories.
download_instructions: Download from GEO supplementary files. Large dataset - check storage requirements.

data_type: perturb-seq
description: Genome-wide Perturb-seq in RPE1 cells (non-cancer human retinal pigment epithelial). Complements K562 data with a non-cancer cell line.
download_instructions: Download the RPE1 h5ad file from the same Figshare deposit as K562. Process with setup.py --cell-line rpe1.

data_type: bulk RNA-seq
description: TCGA Pan-Cancer Atlas: RNA-seq across 33 cancer types and matched normal tissue. DE analysis available per cancer type.
download_instructions: 1. Go to GDC Data Portal. 2. Select cancer type. 3. Download gene expression quantification files. 4. DE analysis can be performed with DESeq2 or use published DE tables from TCGA publications.

data_type: bulk RNA-seq
description: Gene expression across 54 human tissues from 948 donors. Baseline (healthy) reference. Useful for tissue-specificity context rather than disease DE.
download_instructions: 1. Go to GTEx portal. 2. Download TPM or read count matrices. 3. Tissue-specific expression can serve as a baseline reference.

data_type: bulk RNA-seq
description: CommonMind Consortium: RNA-seq of dorsolateral prefrontal cortex from 258 SCZ + 279 control subjects. Well-powered bulk DE study.
download_instructions: 1. Create Synapse account. 2. Apply for CommonMind Consortium access. 3. Download normalized expression and DE tables.

data_type: bulk RNA-seq
description: ROSMAP: RNA-seq of dorsolateral prefrontal cortex from ~600 subjects with Alzheimer's disease clinical and pathological data.
